{{CargoRelic
|name=Strategies of the Warring States
|class_id=22777
|rank=SSS
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=Strategies of the Warring States, also known as National Strategies, is an important document recording historical events of the Warring States period, divided into thirty-three volumes and twelve national strategies, serving as an important document for studying the history and geography of the Warring States period.
|fame=108
|art=58
|fth=54
|civ=69
|tech=73
|ss1=Snail Leadership +3<br>Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +30<br>Per 3 Minion Skins crafted, Snail DEF +9<br>Minion Skins crafted: 60/60
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4<br>Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +40<br>Per 3 Minion Skins crafted, Snail DEF +12<br>Minion Skins crafted: 60/60
|ss3=Snail Leadership +5<br>Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +50<br>Per 3 Minion Skins crafted, Snail DEF +15<br>Minion Skins crafted: 60/60
|ss4=Snail Leadership +7<br>Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +70<br>Per 3 Minion Skins crafted, Snail DEF +21<br>Minion Skins crafted: 60/60
|ss5=Snail Leadership +9<br>Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +90<br>Per 3 Minion Skins crafted, Snail DEF +27<br>Minion Skins crafted: 60/60
|ss6=Snail Leadership +12<br>Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +120<br>Per 3 Minion Skins crafted, Snail DEF +36<br>Minion Skins crafted: 60/60
|ss7=Snail Leadership +12<br>Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +120<br>Per 3 Minion Skins crafted, Snail DEF +36<br>Minion Skins crafted: 60/60<br>Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +100 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Snail DEF +600
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Snail FAME +15
|skill3=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Snail ATK +600
}}
